document.title: FFC Cable Ass'y Approval Register / Request for Approval, Code No. 3809-003168
document.documentType: component approval sheet, request for approval, detailed specification, inspection data, and warranty/representation package

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval and specification package for HE HUI FFC Cable Ass'y code 3809-003168, including electrical, mechanical, environmental, process control, RoHS, UL, and warranty information.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports Samsung component approval and supplier technical data submission for FFC Cable Ass'y 3809-003168.
keyPoints: Component approval is listed as INITIAL APPROVAL with Rev:00 and release to purchase department.
The requested part is an FFC Cable Ass'y with Code No. 3809-003168, SEC Part No. FT12-16Y580XXC-SAX, and Maker P/N HF20-TV-123.
The detailed specification states the product shall comply with UL certified product, UL number E248682, including style 20624.

Electrical specifications include conductor resistance max. 1110mΩ, insulation resistance more than 100MΩ at DC500V for 1 min, withstanding voltage no breakdown at AC500V for 1 min, and contact resistance max. NH 30mΩ.
Environmental hazardous substance analysis reports result Good and no problem; analysis data list Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr-VI, PBBs, and PBDEs as N.D.
The Letter of Warranty and Representation states compliance with international environmental substance regulations and Samsung Environmental Standards 0QA-2049.

evidence.claim: The product is required to comply with a UL certified product under UL number E248682, including style 20624.
evidence.evidenceText: Shall comply with UL certified product. Our products UL number is E248682, including style 20624

evidence.claim: UL20624 is rated 80℃ and 60V and marked ROHS.
evidence.evidenceText: Style No. Ratings for Temp. Ratings for Voltage Remark UL20624 80℃ 60V ROHS

evidence.claim: Reference documents include MIL-STD-202, MIL-STD-1344A, EIA-364, UL 94, and UL 498.
evidence.evidenceText: Reference document A) MIL-STD-202 ... B) MIL-STD-1344A ... C) EIA-364 ... D) UL 94 ... E) UL 498

evidence.claim: Electrical specifications include max. 1110mΩ conductor resistance, more than 100MΩ insulation resistance at DC500V for 1 min, no breakdown at AC500V for 1 min, and max. NH 30mΩ contact resistance.
evidence.evidenceText: Conductor Resistance ... Max. 1110mΩ ... Insulation Resistance ... More than 100MΩ (DC500V, 1min) ... Withstanding Voltage ... No Breakdown (AC500V, 1min, 10mA) ... Contact resistance ... MAX NH(30mΩ)

evidence.claim: Mechanical specifications include unit product weight 3.19g, conductor adhesive strength min. 30gf, flexible test with no physical damage and no open, withdrawal force board S1/S2 1.5kgf/min, connector withdrawal force min. 1.0Kgf, and 20 connector insertions with no burr and no open or short.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Weight A unit weight measure 3.19g ... Conductor Adhesive Strength ... Min. 30gf ... Flexible test ... No physical damage,No open ... Withdrawal Force ... Board S1 1.5kgf/min Board S2 1.5kgf/min ... Connector Withdrawal force ... Min. 1.0Kgf ... Insert test Each connector ,20 times ... NO Burr Not open of short of conductor

evidence.claim: Environmental specification tests include heat resistance, cold resistance, humidity resistance, temperature cycling, and salt mist spray.
evidence.evidenceText: 8-4.Environmental Specification ... Heat Resistance ... Cold Resistance ... Humidity Resistance ... Temperature Cycling ... Salt Mist Spray

evidence.claim: Salt mist spray condition is 5% salt solution at 35℃ for 72 hours, with no corrosion, rust, or discoloration at metal department.
evidence.evidenceText: Salt Mist Spray 5% Solution Of Salt, 35℃ 72Hour There is not a corrosion and rust and a discolor at metal department.

evidence.claim: Gold plating on terminals is performed over nickel and gold in order on bare copper wires.
evidence.evidenceText: Gold plating FFC is laminated with bare copper wires and electroplated with nickel(Ni) and gold(Au) in order.

evidence.claim: Plating thickness requirement is Au 0.05㎛ minimum and Ni 2.0㎛ minimum; reported averages are Au 0.0792 and Ni 2.685 with OK result.
evidence.evidenceText: Requirement Contact Area of FFC Film : Au 0.05㎛ Min, / Ni 2.0㎛ Min ... Avg 0.0792 2.685 Result OK OK

evidence.claim: Hazardous substance analysis result is Good and analysis opinion states no problem.
evidence.evidenceText: Test Purpose Environmental Hazardous Substance analysis Result Good ... Analysis result opinion ☞ No problem.

evidence.claim: Analysis data for conductor, insulation film, supporting tape, ink, PET, NITTO5000NS, and plating reports Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr-VI, PBBs, and PBDEs as N.D.
evidence.evidenceText: Analysis Data（PPM=mg/kg） Cd Pb Hg Cr-VI PBBs PBDEs ... N.D N.D N.D N.D N.D N.D

evidence.claim: The self-declaration states cadmium, lead, mercury, chromium(VI), PBBs, and PBDEs are not used.
evidence.evidenceText: Class Ⅰ Cadmium and compounds ⒳ ... Lead and compounds ⒳ ... Mercury and compounds ⒳ ... Chrome(VI) and componds ⒳ ... Polybrominated biphenyls(PBBs) ⒳ ... Polybrominated diphenylethers(PBDEs) ⒳

evidence.claim: The company warrants compliance with relevant international regulations concerning substances with environmental impacts.
evidence.evidenceText: Company complies with all relevant international regulations concerning the substances with environmental impacts.

evidence.claim: The company warrants compliance with Samsung Environmental Standards 0QA-2049.
evidence.evidenceText: Company complies with the Samsung Electronics Standards for Control of Substances with Environmental Impacts within Products("Samsung Environmental Standards, 0QA-2049")

evidence.claim: The Letter of Warranty and Representation is effective from 2021.05.06 to 2022.05.06 and renews yearly unless objected in writing at least a month before expiration.
evidence.evidenceText: This Letter shall be effective from 2021.05.06. to 2022.05.06 , and thereafter,shall be automatically renewed for each additional year unless SEC or Company objects such renewal in writing at least a month prior to an expiration date.

evidence.claim: Disputes related to the Letter are to be finally settled by arbitration in English under Korean Commercial Arbitration Board rules in Seoul, Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: All disputes related to this Letter shall be finally settled by arbitration. The arbitration shall be conducted in English and in accordance with the Commercial Arbitration Rules of the Korean Commercial Arbitration Board. The arbitration shall take place in Seoul, Korea.

evidence.evidenceText: Bag Packing Quantity 200pcs Tray Packing Quantity 200pcs*4bag=800pcs Box Packing Quantity 800pcs*4tray=3200PCS Net(Unit) Weight 3.19g±5% Gross(Box) Weight 12.35KG±5%

evidence.claim: New parts yield rate estimation reports total acceptance rate RTY 97% and total sigma standard 3.4.
evidence.evidenceText: Total Accepte Rate(RTY) 97% Total Sigma Standard 3.4

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal says FDA, but the source text does not mention FDA; extracted authority/jurisdiction is limited to Samsung, UL references, and arbitration venue/body present in the text.
The document appears to be a supplier/customer component approval package rather than a government regulatory approval; regulatory authority is ambiguous.
Approval Date field in the component approval sheet is blank, but request, approval signatures, revision history, control plan, self-declaration, and warranty sections consistently show 2021.05.06.
Source includes OCR and transcription issues such as Factroy1, Srorage, Teating, incluedede, and anomalous numeric text; key facts were extracted only where wording was sufficiently clear.
Source path filename contains 2021.05.10, while the document text repeatedly states 2021.05.06 for request, approval, revision, and warranty dates.
ProductSignal lists HAD/A/F 1417-1717, but those model identifiers are not present in the SOURCE_TEXT and were not added to productModels.
